svg.title: Raspberry Pi to 4-pin PWM fan wiring
svg.desc: A 12V supply powers the fan's +12V and ground. The Pi drives the fan PWM pin from GPIO18 and reads the tach pin on GPIO24 through a 10k pull-up to 3.3V. All grounds are common. The Pi never connects to 12V, and the tach is pulled up to 3.3V, not 5V.
svg.text: pull tach up to 3.3 V — never 5 V
